sections.heading: Sales Tax Calculator – Find Pre-Tax, After-Tax & Reverse Sales Tax Instantly
sections.content: Our online Sales Tax Calculator helps you quickly calculate the sales tax, pre-tax price, after-tax total, and reverse tax in just seconds. Whether you’re shopping, preparing an invoice, or running an eCommerce store, this tool saves time by giving you accurate tax-inclusive and tax-exclusive amounts.

sections.heading: How the Sales Tax Calculator Works

subSections.heading: 1. Add Sales Tax (Tax Exclusive → Tax Inclusive)
subSections.content: Total Price = Pre-Tax Price + (Pre-Tax Price × Sales Tax Rate)

subSections.heading: 2. Find Sales Tax from Total Price (Reverse Tax)
subSections.content: Sales Tax = Total Price – (Total Price ÷ (1 + Tax Rate))

subSections.heading: 3. Pre-Tax Price from Total (Tax Inclusive → Exclusive)
subSections.content: Pre-Tax Price = Total Price ÷ (1 + Tax Rate)

subSections.heading: Example 1 (Add Tax)
subSections.content: Item price = $100, Sales Tax Rate = 8% → Total = $100 + ($100 × 0.08) = $108

subSections.heading: Example 2 (Reverse Tax)
subSections.content: Total Price (Tax Inclusive) = $108, Tax Rate = 8% → Pre-Tax Price = $108 ÷ 1.08 = $100, Sales Tax = $108 – $100 = $8

sections.heading: Common Use Cases
sections.content: Shopping & Retail, Invoices & Billing, eCommerce, State-Specific calculations (US state taxes), and International use (Canada GST/HST, UK VAT).

subSections.heading: Sales Tax (USA)
subSections.content: Charged at the final point of sale to the consumer.

subSections.heading: VAT (UK & EU)
subSections.content: Added at each stage of the supply chain, with businesses reclaiming input tax.

sections.heading: Why Use This Calculator?
sections.content:
✔ Fast & Accurate instant results
✔ Works for pre-tax, after-tax, and reverse tax
✔ Covers USA, Canada (GST/HST), UK VAT, and more
✔ Perfect for shoppers, freelancers, accountants, and businesses

faq.q: How do you calculate sales tax manually?
faq.a: Multiply the pre-tax price by the sales tax rate, then add it to the original price.

faq.q: What is reverse sales tax and when is it useful?
faq.a: Reverse sales tax helps you find the pre-tax price when you only know the total (tax-inclusive) amount. Useful for receipts, invoices, and accounting.

faq.q: How do I find sales tax from the total price?
faq.a: Use this formula: Sales Tax = Total Price – (Total Price ÷ (1 + Tax Rate))

faq.q: What is the difference between VAT and sales tax?
faq.a: Sales Tax is collected only at the final sale, while VAT is collected at each stage of production and distribution.

faq.q: How does tax inclusive vs exclusive pricing work?
faq.a: Tax Exclusive means tax is added separately to the base price, while Tax Inclusive means the final price already includes tax.

faq.q: What is the sales tax rate in the USA?
faq.a: Rates vary by state, e.g., California (7.25%), New York (4% state + local rates), Texas (6.25%). Always check your local rate.

faq.q: Can I use this calculator for Canada GST/HST or UK VAT?
faq.a: Yes. The calculator works with any tax rate, including Canada GST/HST and UK VAT.

faq.q: Is sales tax the same for online shopping and in-store purchases?
faq.a: It depends. Many US states now require eCommerce sales tax collection, similar to in-store purchases.
